examples.title: Pseudocode: Block Header Structure
examples.description: A simplified representation of a block header's structure
examples.code:
STRUCTURE BlockHeader
 version: INTEGER (4 bytes)
 previousBlockHash: HASH (32 bytes)
 merkleRoot: HASH (32 bytes)
 timestamp: INTEGER (4 bytes)
 difficultyTarget: INTEGER (4 bytes)
 nonce: INTEGER (4 bytes)
END STRUCTURE
examples.explanation: This pseudocode defines the basic structure of a block header with its six fields.

examples.title: Python: Block Header Class
examples.description: A Python class representing a block header
examples.explanation: This Python class represents a block header with its six fields and includes a method to calculate the block header's hash.

examples.title: C: Block Header Struct
examples.description: A C struct representing a block header
examples.explanation: This C struct represents a block header with its six fields and includes a function to calculate the block header's hash.
